retrospective_1: This week we received our brief for our New Enterprise Summative. For this week my goals were to deconstruct the brief and select a topic to explore and research. I chose to research networking and finding work in the film industry. I was also able to get my problem statement approved without many barriers in place. I set up a time for mentoring and my feedback was very positive.
retrospective_2: What I did struggle with initially was finding a topic to explore. To help me kick start my project I talked to people I knew about problems they had in their everyday lives. This was were my partner mentioned her struggle with finding work in her current industry which sparked my interest in my chosen topic.
retrospective_3: For my research I need to explore a few more perspectives and topics that could relate to my problem statement, or give me more insight on this I might have missed. I am also in progress to do a field review so that I can incorporate scholarly resources into my research.
retrospective_4: For the next sprint my actions are to broaden my research and continue exploring my chosen topic. I will also conduct user interviews which will allow me to create user my user journeys and empathy maps. Finally I will create a design strategy and prepare a WIP presentation to finalize my chosen solution based on all my primary and secondary research.
monday: I organized my files and started to deconstruct the brief. My current blockers are not knowing what topic to explore for this assignment.
tuesday: After having a conversation with my partner, I came up with the idea to explore networking and finding work in the film industry. My current blockers are wondering what audience I want to target within my topic.
wednesday: I spent some time discovering and exploring the topics of freelancing as broad overview as well as within the film industry. I also looked at many statistics in NZ to do with contracting and employment within the screen industry. My current blockers are writing my problem statement.
thursday: I contacted and scheduled people to interview next week. I currently have 4 - 6 people that I will be interviewing. My current blockers are structuring my user interview questions so that I get the most information I need efficiently.
friday: I attended a mentoring session with melody, which was extremely helpful for guiding any small refinements in my process that I may have missed.
